hypothesis: A multi-modal LLM continually pre-trained on MOF literature plus aligned textualized 3D structural encodings (e.g., SOAP descriptors or coordination-number tokens) will achieve a lower mean absolute error on QMOF band-gap prediction than both the PMC+PubChem pre-trained text-only LLM and CGCNN when fine-tuned with ≤5,000 supervised examples.
